issues.description: Effect completely misrepresents card mechanics. Card searches top 5 cards for up to 1 Dressrosa Character, reveals it, adds to hand, then places rest at bottom in any order. DSL only performs a cost-based deck search with no reveal, no card limit, no bottom placement, and no deck organization.
Filter uses 'ByCost' (maxCost:5) instead of card type filter. Should filter by type='Dressrosa' and type='Character'.
SearchDeck action doesn't support 'up to 1' card limitation or reveal mechanic. Missing reveal action and bottom deck placement logic.

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Dressrosa} type Character card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
